headline: Principal® Broadens Retirement Income Offering with New Options
summary: DES MOINES, Iowa, June 30, 2026--Principal Financial Group® is expanding its Principal® income suite with additional offerings designed to help Americans turn retirement savings into dependable income. The new savings vehicles with the ability to generate lifetime income can be available within an employer’s defined contribution investment lineup and will include the Principal® LifeTime Income Builder Index collective investment trusts (CITs) target date funds (TDFs).
